name: Deterministic Snapshot Harness

userStory.iWant: to record interactive sessions and verify they produce identical results in the future
userStory.soThat: I can catch visual regressions and breaking logic changes with absolute certainty (DIND).

acceptanceCriteria: A Recorder middleware captures all BusMsg and TTY frame hashes
Sessions can be saved to a .tape (JSON/Binary) file
The Replay engine can drive an App using the recorded messages
The Replay engine asserts that the resulting Surface/TTY hashes match the recorded 'goldens'
Supports 'Hostile Input' replays to ensure stability
backwardCompatibility: Purely additive; no impact on runtime performance unless recording is active.

testPlan.goldenPath: Record a session of the 'Accordion' example. Modify the accordion logic. Replay the tape and verify that the test fails if a single pixel changed.
edgeCases: Time-dependent apps (should mock the Heartbeat during replay)
Async command timing (should wait for Cmd resolution during replay)
testPlan.fuzzStress: Generate 1000 randomized 'Monkey Tapes' and assert that the application never panics or reaches an inconsistent state.
failureCases: Non-deterministic logic (e.g. Math.random) breaking the replay chain

estimatedComplexity.timeComplexity: O(N) where N is tape length
